rationale: Educ. Code §11.1512 governs board-superintendent collaboration and trustee access to district records. It contains no provisions related to property tax homestead exemptions or appraised value limits under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The superintendent shall, on a day-to-day basis, ensure the implementation of the policies created by the board.
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses school district governance and trustee information access, not property tax exemptions.
